title: Appa Sniffer
description: Who has 6 legs and lots of fur? Sni- APPA!
body:
I looked for a Sniffer Appa, only found one, decided to spice it up a bit. This pack requires a [custom entity mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and a [custom texture mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

There are two versions, one that requires a name tag, the other does not.

Does not work with [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads), as the Sniffer model is currently bugged.
